result.stdout:
USAGE: release [--help] [<subcommand> [<options>]]

SUBCOMMANDS:

    nuget <options>       Commands related to nuget release.

    Use 'release <subcommand> --help' for additional information.

OPTIONS:

    --help                display this list of options.

commands.payload:
USAGE: release [--help] [<subcommand> [<options>]]

SUBCOMMANDS:

    nuget <options>       Commands related to nuget release.

    Use 'release <subcommand> --help' for additional information.

OPTIONS:

    --help                display this list of options.

result.stdout:
USAGE: release nuget [--help] [--api-key <string>] [--source <string>]
                     [--configuration <string>] [--project <string>]
                     [--changelog <string>]

OPTIONS:

    --api-key, -k <string>
                          The API key for the server.
    --source, -s <string> Package source (URL, UNC/folder path or package
                          source name) to use.
    --configuration, -c <string>
                          The configuration to use for building the package.
                          Defaults to Release.
    --project, -p <string>
                          The project to operate on. If a file is not
                          specified, the command will search the current
                          directory for one.
    --changelog <string>  Relative path to the changelog file. Default, to
                          ChangelogFile attributes if found in the project file
                          or CHANGELOG.md in last resort.
    --help                display this list of options.
